headlines.description: — Jake Browning and the Cincinnati Bengals turned a nightmarish first half — including an injury to Joe Burrow — into a dream finish.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jake Browning relieves the injured Joe Burrow and scores late TD as Bengals beat Jaguars 31-27

events.name: New York Giants at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott wasn't thinking late in a wild duel with Russell Wilson about his long personal winning streak against the New York Giants, and probably not about the prospect of Brian Schottenheimer's first victory as a head coach.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aubrey ends wild Prescott-Wilson duel with FG as time expires in OT as Cowboys top Giants 40-37

headlines.description: — The Detroit Lions showed they can pile up points just fine without Ben Johnson calling plays.
headlines.shortLinkText: Goff throws 5 TDs, 3 to St. Brown, and Lions bounce back with 52-21 win over Ben Johnson-led Bears

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Rams know how efficient they can be on offense. They clicked into high gear Sunday when they had to, scoring 20 straight points to spoil rookie Cam Ward's NFL home opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford throws 2 TDs as Rams spoil home opener for Titans and Cam Ward

events.name: New England Patriots at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — Antonio Gibson burst through the Miami Dolphins' coverage unit on a kick return and dived into the end zone while New England coach Mike Vrabel excitedly chased him almost the entire way down the Patriots' sideline.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maye accounts for 3 TDs and Patriots top Dolphins 33-27 for Vrabel's 1st win as New England coach

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Mac Jones' San Francisco teammates kept mentioning what a luxury it is for the 49ers to have a backup quarterback who exudes the “confidence” and “swagger” of a starter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mac Jones shines in relief of Brock Purdy as the 49ers top the Saints 26-21

events.name: Buffalo Bills at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Josh Allen's nose might have taken the biggest hit by the Buffalo Bills against the New York Jets.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen bounces back from bloody nose, leads Bills to easy 30-10 victory over Jets

headlines.description: — George Holani saw the ball bouncing toward the Pittsburgh end zone, wondered why Steelers kick returner Kaleb Johnson turned his back on a live football, and kept right on running.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks' George Holani turns the Steelers' blunder on a kickoff into a TD as Seattle wins 31-17

headlines.description: — The Baltimore Ravens finished this game better than they started it.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson throws 4 TD passes, and the Ravens close strong in a 41-17 victory over the Browns

headlines.description: — Indianapolis Colts kicker Spencer Shrader missed one opportunity to beat the Denver Broncos.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spencer Shrader converts from 45 yards after penalty on 60-yard miss and Colts beat Broncos 29-28

headlines.description: — Calais Campbell and his 39-year-old body came up with a game-ending sack to help the Arizona Cardinals secure a 27-22 win on Sunday over the Carolina Panthers, turning back a frantic...
headlines.shortLinkText: Calais Campbell's sack with 26 seconds left secures Cardinals' 27-22 win after Carolina comeback try

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The goal for the Philadelphia Eagles is to be playing their best at the end of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eagles' defense shines in Super Bowl rematch as Philly beats the Chiefs 20-17 at Arrowhead Stadium

headlines.description: — Bijan Robinson got back to work on the ground, and the Atlanta Falcons were back in business.
headlines.shortLinkText: Falcons trample J.J. McCarthy and the Vikings 22-6 behind Bijan Robinson's running, dominant defense
